'''Godo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the source of [[flame gem]]s. The world was saved by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The [[Godoan/Legends|Godoans]] refused to save Lando from a deadly [[Godoan's disease|disease]] in return until the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] threatened to attack Godo.

[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] once stole a valuable statue from the [[Godoan/Legends|Godoans]], the [[Dancing Goddess/Legends|Dancing Goddess]], and the [[Minstrel]], both of which were unexplainable connected to the planet's lifeforms. His former servant [[Doda Bodonawieedo/Legends|Doda Bodonawieedo]] sold it back to them after the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] death, demanding an exorbitant price, which was paid in order to regain the planet's vitality.
